correct: Calculates the cosine similarity between two vectors, returning a value close to zero if either vector is of nearly zero magnitude.
distractors: Extracts and formats the contents of a Rust function definition between its opening and closing curly braces.
Generates a pseudorandom sequence of unique indices to reorder an array in a specific way based on initial seed values and shuffles the original array accordingly.
Exports a collection of serialized JSON representations of quiz items and writes them into an organized directory.

correct: Creates and opens an asynchronous collection with specified embedding dimensions and cosine distance metric.
distractors: The code asynchronously processes and stores text embeddings from files in batches of up to 1000 characters into a collection, flushing the results at intervals.
